Returns all registered task definitions.
Registers new task definitions.
Returns a specific task definition by name.
Deletes a task definition by name.
Starts a new workflow execution.
Returns the execution details of a specific workflow.
Terminates a running workflow execution.
Pauses a running workflow execution.
Resumes a paused workflow execution.
Restarts a completed or terminated workflow from the beginning.
Retries a failed workflow from the last failed task.
Reruns a completed workflow from a specific task.
Skips a specific task in a running workflow.
Search for workflow executions based on query parameters.
Polls for a task of a given type for a worker.
Polls for multiple tasks of a given type.
Updates the status of a task with results.
Returns details of a specific task.
Returns the sizes of task queues.
Returns all registered event handlers.
Registers a new event handler.

The Conductor OSS REST API exposes the workflow orchestration engine's surface for managing workflow definitions, starting and querying workflow executions, handling tasks and workers, registering event handlers, and administering metadata. Conductor OSS is the Netflix-founded, Orkes-stewarded open source workflow and agentic AI orchestration platform.
